posts.title: How Long Does Probate Take in California? (Longer Than You Think)
posts.description: California probate takes longer than most families expect. Here's what's actually happening behind the scenes and what you can do to keep things moving.

posts.title: What an Executor Must Do Before a Probate Property Sale in California
posts.description: Before you list a probate home in California, there are court steps, creditor windows, and fees you need to know. Gregg McElwee breaks it down plainly.
